chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.Nos.D- 2058 & 2244 of 2025 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of main case. 29.05.2025 Mr.Ramiz Naseem, Advocate for the Petitioners. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. S.I. Muhammad Ayub, FIA Investigation, DSP Ayaz Ahmed, Foreign Registration Office, Special Branch Karachi, SIP Jawaid Akhtar, F.R.O. Special Branch Karachi and Mr.Raza Mian, DSP Legal are present. Comments filed and it is stated on behalf of respondents as follows:- “ To allow to verify their legal documents through Ministry of Foreign Affairs for confirmation of their genuineness. To allow to verify their status, criminal record CRO / CRI accordingly because they are illegally staying in Pakistan since long. To direct D.G. NADRA Sindh to verify the petitioners through Bio- Matric for NADRA registration, if petitioners register in NADRA, their CNICs may be cancelled/Blocked and also provide clearance certificate to petitioners. To allow, to deport to their native country, after completing legal and required formalities under the Foreigner Act, 1946.” Learned counsel for the petitioners states that these petitions may be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Let copy of this order be placed in the connected petition. Judge Judge nasir
